title: Number of Substrings Containing All Three Characters
titleCn: 包含所有三种字符的子字符串数目

testcases.input: s = "abcabc" Output: 10 Explanation: The substrings containing at least one occurrence of the characters a, b and c are "abc", "abca", "abcab", "abcabc", "bca", "bcab", "bcabc", "cab", "cabc" and "abc" (again).
testcases.expectedOutput: 10 Explanation: The substrings containing at least one occurrence of the characters a, b and c are "abc", "abca", "abcab", "abcabc", "bca", "bcab", "bcabc", "cab", "cabc" and "abc" (again).

testcases.input: s = "aaacb" Output: 3 Explanation: The substrings containing at least one occurrence of the characters a, b and c are "aaacb", "aacb" and "acb".
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: The substrings containing at least one occurrence of the characters a, b and c are "aaacb", "aacb" and "acb".
